passageParts.content: Advances in artificial intelligence (AI) are rapidly transforming every aspect of human life. The world of AI is buzzing with an exciting potential to improve and enrich our lives.
, AI also has the potential hazard of
our experiences in ways we might find difficult to control. One such

is how we understand and experience beauty.

AI can be a collaborative tool in a wide range of creative endeavors.
the creation of human creativity and AI algorithms can lead to unique artistic
that are beautiful to the human eye. These collaborations are likely to become increasingly common
, as convenient and provocative. AI enables virtual try-on experiences where you can virtually
makeup, hairstyles, clothing, and even cosmetic procedure
making any physical changes. Individuals can now experiment with different looks and

their preferences, potentially expanding the range of beauty ideals.

AI algorithms can
facial features and skin conditions to provide personalized beauty recommendations. This
approach aims to cater to individual preferences and enhance the concept of beauty tailored to each person's unique characteristics.

, AI can be a fun vehicle for self-discovery.

While AI offers exciting possibilities, it also raises ethical
. There is a risk of deepening societal beauty
and perpetuating unattainable beauty standards
. AI-powered beauty filters and editing tools can lead to distorted self-perception and
body dissatisfaction. As summarized in a recent post on "The Hidden Dangers of Online Beauty Filters",
on this technology for social presentation can cause harm

body image issues, lower self-esteem, and social anxiety.

It's important to note that while AI can enhance our
of beauty, it should not
the genuine human experience and the emotional connections we derive from seeing the beauty in each other.

blanks.clue: 前文讲 AI 的积极潜力，后文说 AI also has the potential hazard，形成让步补充。
blanks.strategy: 先判断前后句逻辑，再选择连接词。

blanks.clue: potential hazard 与 difficult to control 对应。
blanks.strategy: 优先看空格前后的情感色彩和搭配。

blanks.clue: how we understand and experience beauty 是 AI 影响的一个领域。
blanks.strategy: 名词题要看后文解释的是范围、原因还是观点。

blanks.clue: human creativity and AI algorithms 形成结合关系。
blanks.strategy: 看到 A and B 时优先判断两者关系。

blanks.clue: lead to unique artistic ... that are beautiful。
blanks.strategy: 看 lead to 后面需要结果还是前景。

blanks.clue: 后文 virtual try-on experiences 是对 collaborations 的例子。
blanks.strategy: 判断后句是在举例、对比还是总结。

blanks.clue: virtual try-on experiences 与 makeup, hairstyles, clothing 搭配。
blanks.strategy: 动词题优先看宾语。

blanks.clue: 虚拟试妆是在真实改变之前进行。
blanks.strategy: 介词题要还原动作发生顺序。

blanks.clue: experiment with different looks and ... their preferences。
blanks.strategy: 看并列动词与宾语是否自然搭配。

blanks.clue: AI algorithms can ... facial features and skin conditions。
blanks.strategy: 技术语境中注意 analyze 与 data/features 搭配。

blanks.clue: personalized beauty recommendations 与 individual preferences 对应。
blanks.strategy: 抓同义复现：personalized 与 customized。

blanks.clue: 前文说明个性化推荐，后文总结 AI can be a fun vehicle。
blanks.strategy: 判断空格所在句是否承接前文方式。

blanks.clue: raises ethical ... 是常见搭配。
blanks.strategy: 识别固定表达 raise concerns。

blanks.clue: unattainable beauty standards 与 societal beauty ... 对应负向压力。
blanks.strategy: 根据后文负向结果判断名词色彩。

blanks.clue: deepening societal beauty pressures and perpetuating ... 是并列补充。
blanks.strategy: 副词题先判断前后动作关系。

blanks.clue: lead to distorted self-perception and ... body dissatisfaction。
blanks.strategy: 判断主语是否造成后文结果。

blanks.clue: rely on this technology 是固定搭配。
blanks.strategy: 看到 on 后优先考虑固定搭配。

blanks.clue: body image issues, lower self-esteem, and social anxiety 是 harm 的具体例子。
blanks.strategy: 判断后面是否列举例子。

blanks.clue: enhance our ... of beauty。
blanks.strategy: 注意抽象名词与 beauty 的自然搭配。

blanks.clue: AI should not ... the genuine human experience。
blanks.strategy: 结尾观点句要抓作者限制性态度。

discourseAnalysis.mainIdea: 文章讨论 AI 在美的体验与审美领域的积极作用及潜在伦理风险。

structure.summary: AI 改变生活，同时也可能影响人类体验。
AI 可以帮助人们尝试外貌、探索审美偏好。
AI 可以提供个性化美容推荐。
AI 美颜工具可能加剧美貌压力和身体焦虑。
AI 可以增强审美体验，但不应取代真实的人际审美经验。

logicSignals.explanation: 从积极潜力转到潜在风险。
承认积极作用后提出伦理问题。

coreWords.sentence: Advances in artificial intelligence (AI) are rapidly transforming every aspect of human life.
AI can be a collaborative tool in a wide range of creative endeavors.
AI algorithms can analyze facial features and skin conditions to provide personalized beauty recommendations.
While AI offers exciting possibilities, it also raises ethical concerns.
AI-powered beauty filters and editing tools can lead to distorted self-perception.

familiarWordsWithNewMeanings.sentence: AI can be a fun vehicle for self-discovery.

phrases.sentence: This customized approach aims to cater to individual preferences.
AI-powered beauty filters and editing tools can lead to distorted self-perception.
Relying on this technology for social presentation can cause harm.
